working_on: Phase 1 insertion ahead of planned 1.2 rendering policy: privacy posture commitments. Author ADR 0026 establishing 'persistent learner storage is structural, not substantive', including a transcript-retention sub-decision; open OQ-PRIVACY-A (erasure mechanism) and OQ-PRIVACY-B (institutional vs individual regime, direction-neutral); add Phase 8 success-criteria bullet pinning privacy-policy + Apple privacy-questionnaire work to App Store submission lead time. Reorders: Phase 1.2 rendering policy moves to S-0008 and will take ADR 0027.
outcome_summary: Privacy posture commitments landed at production quality. ADR 0026 establishes the structural-not-substantive principle with three operational sub-decisions: (1) tension_log.exchange_summary becomes JSONB-with-named-fields (replacing TEXT NOT NULL) with bounded pattern_observed free-text + Sonnet writing-policy bounds; (2) learner_events.context schematized as fixed structured columns at Phase 3 (no JSONB grab-bag); (3) conversation transcripts not persisted as system-of-record data (operational TTL: session-end default, 24-hour hard cap). Two open questions opened in tensions.md (decide-before Phase 3): OQ-PRIVACY-A (erasure mechanism: crypto-shred vs hard-delete-cascade vs anonymize-aggregate) and OQ-PRIVACY-B (institutional vs individual regime, direction-neutral). ROADMAP Phase 8 success criteria gains a privacy-policy + Apple App Store privacy questionnaire alignment bullet pinned to the 2–4 week Apple lead time. Cross-refs added in architecture.md (Institutional Schema Provisions inheritance), business.md (fine-tuning constraint + privacy posture/policy distinction), CROSS_REFERENCES.md (5-consumer entry + Phase 2→3 boundary check). docs/self-correction.md tension_log schema updated to JSONB shape with documented field semantics. Phase 1.2 rendering policy reordered to S-0008 (ADR 0027 reserved). MemPalace decision drawer filed (drawer_paideia_general_b729dee479daa86df6cb05ac) capturing the off-system-to-build-session handoff pattern and the substantive pushback that shaped the final ADR. tools/validate.py clean (zero hard-fails, zero soft-warns) on every iteration. No partial completion; no destructive operations; no escalations.
